TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Oro'raw ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 40 buwan, 108 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 97 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 11 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, saySiyat 77%, Tayan 11%, Amis 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Oro'raw hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Oro'raw hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Oro'raw hya' llyung. tay mkraya' na Oro'raw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'llaw na Oro'raw hya' ga R'ra'. tay 'zil na Oro'raw hya' ga Kyu'ang. rekisi kayal qmisan lga, hzyaq balay maki' te rgyax hiya'. kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ oroʔraw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕajs~ɕijat **%, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na oroʔraw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na oroʔraw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na oroʔraw ħjaʔ lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na oroʔraw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔllaw na oroʔraw ħjaʔ ɣa rʔraʔ. taj ʔzil na oroʔraw ħjaʔ ɣa kjuʔaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal qmis~ɕan lɣa, ħzjaq βalaj makiʔ te rɣjax ħijaʔ. kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Oro'raw ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 40 buwan, 108 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 97 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 11 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, saySiyat 77%, Tayan 11%, Amis 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Oro'raw hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Oro'raw hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Oro'raw hya' llyung. tay mkraya' na Oro'raw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'llaw na Oro'raw hya' ga R'ra'. tay 'zil na Oro'raw hya' ga Kyu'ang. rekisi kayal qmisan lga, hzyaq balay maki' te rgyax hiya'. kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ oroʔraw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕajs~ɕijat **%, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na oroʔraw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na oroʔraw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na oroʔraw ħjaʔ lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na oroʔraw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔllaw na oroʔraw ħjaʔ ɣa rʔraʔ. taj ʔzil na oroʔraw ħjaʔ ɣa kjuʔaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal qmis~ɕan lɣa, ħzjaq βalaj makiʔ te rɣjax ħijaʔ. kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
